headline: Airline stocks hit turbulence amid Mideast conflict: Latest news
summary: US airline stocks faced slight headwinds in Wednesday's trading session in response to the recent escalations between the US and Iran, compounded by the jolt in oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F). Market Domination Overtime Host Josh Lipton is joined by Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Pras Subramanian for a chat about the latest headlines emerging from the airline industry today, including United Airlines' (UAL) new headphone rule and the airport lounge American Express (AXP) opened in Las Vegas. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

headline: American Express Updates First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Date and Plans to Host Live Audio Webcast of Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: NEW YORK, March 04, 2026--American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) today has announced that it has adjusted the date of its first-quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call to Thursday, April 23, 2026, from Friday, April 24, 2026, previously.

headline: American Express Expands Global Sports and Entertainment Footprint with New Stadium and NFL Team Partnerships
summary: NEW YORK, March 04, 2026--American Express (NYSE:AXP) will soon offer exclusive access, value and experiences for Card Members in the New York/New Jersey and Atlanta metropolitan areas through new long-term partnerships. American Express will be named the Official Payments Partner of MetLife Stadium, the New York Jets, the New York Giants, Mercedes-Benz Stadium, the Atlanta Falcons, Atlanta United and the newly awarded National Women’s Soccer League (NWSL) team which will begin play in 2028. headline: The Tiny New Airport Lounges That Want You In and Out, Fast
summary: Sidecar, the first mini-lounge from  American Express  with seating for 33, was built for shorter stays.  At Sidecar, there are no buffets, showers or phone booths for private calls.  American opened its first Provisions grab-and-go club in Charlotte, N.C., late last summer, and United has two grab-and-go outlets called Club Fly.

headline: Traversal Announces Strategic Investment from Amex Ventures

headline: OTG Appoints Sri Anne as Chief Technology Officer
summary: OTG announced the appointment of Sri Anne as Chief Technology Officer, bringing more than two decades of global leadership across companies including JetBlue Airways, Madison Square Garden and American Express. "I am incredibly excited to join OTG at such an important moment in its growth," said Sri. "OTG's commitment to technology and transforming the guest experience aligns with my passion for building modern, scalable platforms that make a meaningful impact."
